errors.name: Invalid slide type
errors: Slide 1: Slide type 'invalid-slide' is not supported.

errors.name: Invalid coordinates
errors: Slide 1: Component 1: Bounds: Bounds.w must be greater than 0.
Slide 1: Component 1: Bounds: Bounds y+h must not exceed slide height.
Slide 1: Bounds: Bounds.x must be greater than or equal to 0.
Slide 1: Bounds: Bounds x+w must not exceed slide width.
Slide 1: Bounds: Bounds y+h must not exceed slide height.

errors.name: Missing image path
errors: Slide 1: Component 1: Image config must include a valid path string.

errors.name: Invalid chart type
errors: Slide 1: Component 1: Chart type 'scatter' is not supported.
